title: Number required for verdict
doc_html:
§451.19.  Number required for verdict

In order to reach any verdict, five of the jurors trying the case must concur therein.  

Acts 1974, Ex.Sess., No. 30, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.

§451.19.  Number required for verdict
In order to reach any verdict, five of the jurors trying the case must concur therein.
